customrecordtype.aidescription: Lightweight execution log for companion prompt runs. Records which prompt was executed, which tools were called, whether it succeeded, duration, and which version was running. Created by the logExecution companion tool after each prompt execution.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Companion Prompt Ref
customrecordcustomfield.description: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt record (customrecord_dz_companion_prompt) that was executed. Used for execution analytics and incremental usage counters on the prompt record itself. Stored as integer to match the record type's internal ID.
customrecordcustomfield.help: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt that was executed.
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: Internal ID of the executed Crafted Intelligence prompt record (customrecord_dz_companion_prompt). Used for execution analytics and JOINs against prompt records.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Execution Date
customrecordcustomfield.description: Timestamp when the prompt execution started. Recorded by the logExecution tool. Used for execution frequency analysis and recency tracking.
customrecordcustomfield.help: Timestamp when this prompt execution started.
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: Timestamp when prompt execution started. Recorded by logExecution tool. Used for execution frequency analysis and usage reporting.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Tools Called
customrecordcustomfield.description: JSON array of tool names that were actually called during this execution (e.g., ["getBarrelProfile","getBarrelCostTrace"]). May differ from the extension record's tool chain if conditions caused steps to be skipped.
customrecordcustomfield.help: JSON array of tools called during execution. Example: ["getBarrelProfile","getBarrelCostTrace"].
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: JSON array of tool names actually called during this execution (e.g., ["getBarrelProfile","getBarrelCostTrace"]). May differ from tool chain if steps were skipped.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Success
customrecordcustomfield.description: Whether the prompt execution completed successfully. False if any tool call failed, if the user cancelled, or if a safety rule was triggered that prevented completion.
customrecordcustomfield.help: Check if the prompt execution completed successfully.
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: Whether prompt execution completed successfully. False if a tool call failed, user cancelled, or a safety rule prevented completion.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Error Details
customrecordcustomfield.description: Error message or failure reason if the execution did not succeed. Includes the tool name that failed and the error details. Empty when success is true.
customrecordcustomfield.help: Error message if execution failed. Empty on success.
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: Error message or failure reason if execution failed. Includes failing tool name and error details. Empty when success is true.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Duration (seconds)
customrecordcustomfield.description: Total execution duration in seconds from first tool call to final output. Used for performance monitoring and identifying slow prompts. Recorded by the AI at the end of execution.
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: Total execution duration in seconds from first tool call to final output. Used for performance monitoring and identifying slow-running prompts.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Prompt Version
customrecordcustomfield.description: Semantic version of the extension record at the time of execution (e.g., "1.0.0"). Copied from custrecord_dz_pm_version at execution time. Enables version-specific execution analysis even after the prompt is updated in place.
customrecordcustomfield.help: Version of the prompt extension record when this execution occurred.
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: Semantic version of the extension record at execution time (e.g., "1.0.0"). Enables version-specific analytics even after the prompt is updated in place.

customrecordcustomfield.label: AI Agent
customrecordcustomfield.description: Which AI agent executed this prompt (e.g., "claude", "chatgpt"). Supplements Oracle's built-in count_claude and count_chatgpt counters with per-execution granularity.
customrecordcustomfield.help: Name of the AI agent that executed this prompt (e.g., "claude", "chatgpt").
customrecordcustomfield.aidescription: AI agent that executed this prompt (e.g., "claude", "chatgpt"). Supplements Oracle's built-in usage counters with per-execution granularity.
